insight_eab5342c.value: His appointment was probably part of a campaign by the new Tudor dynasty to curb the power of the Anglo-Irish gentry, which included nearly all the judges, who had openly backed the pretender Lambert Simnel and were now suspected of aiding another pretender, Perkin Warbeck

insight_80a58788.value: The Butlers had backed the losing side in the Wars of the Roses , and Ormonde's brother James Butler, 5th Earl of Ormonde had been attainted and executed for treason as a result, but the 6th Earl was quickly pardoned by the new King Edward IV , who greatly admired him

insight_a229cd61.value: Thomas was bailiff of the royal manors of Solihull and Yardley

insight_49a20795.value: Butler, though he himself belonged to a great Anglo-Irish dynasty, was presumably considered to be a loyal servant of the Crown: unlike many of their peers, they had supported the House of Lancaster , from whom the Tudor dynasty derived its claim to the Throne

ext_16ff3f83.value: A black hole is a region of spacetime where gravity is so strong that nothing, no particles or even light, can escape from it

ext_dae777c4.value: The theory of general relativity predicts that a sufficiently compact mass can deform spacetime to form a black hole

ext_80d873be.value: The boundary of the region from which no escape is possible is called the event horizon

ext_e0111c86.value: Although the event horizon has an enormous effect on the fate and circumstances of an object crossing it, no locally detectable features appear to be observed

ext_e5c8e974.value: In many ways, a black hole acts like an ideal black body, as it reflects no light

ext_2062f4d2.value: Quantum entanglement is a phenomenon where particles share a single quantum state

ext_93a0341c.value: While a measurement on one particle instantaneously determines the state of the other regardless of distance, this does not violate relativity

ext_50edda11.value: According to the no-communication theorem, these correlations cannot be used to transmit classical information or messages faster than the speed of light, as the individual measurement results are inherently random

ext_04b1235e.value: In the CRISPR-Cas9 genome editing system, the guide RNA gRNA acts as a specialized navigation molecule

ext_17cb9c42.value: Its primary function is to bind to the Cas9 enzyme and direct it to a specific, complementary sequence of DNA within the genome

ext_1cb43585.value: This ensures that the Cas9 nuclease creates a double-strand break only at the targeted genomic locus, allowing for precise genetic modification

ext_0207e73c.value: To achieve a net energy gain in terrestrial nuclear fusion, specifically using deuterium and tritium isotopes, extreme physical conditions must be met

ext_99c22ae3.value: The fuel must be heated to temperatures exceeding 100 million degrees Celsius to form a plasma state

ext_649394b8.value: Additionally, the plasma must be confined at sufficient density and for a long enough duration a set of requirements known as the Lawson criterion to overcome electrostatic repulsion between nuclei

ext_995ffda5.value: The self-attention mechanism allows a Transformer model to weigh the significance of different words in a sequence relative to a specific target word

ext_8b42b22f.value: Unlike previous recurrent architectures that processed data linearly, self-attention enables the model to capture long-range dependencies and contextual relationships simultaneously across the entire input, significantly improving the representation of complex linguistic structures
